textPlain: The Oakham brewery has a rather fine beer named after him:https://www.oakhamales.com/product/jhb/
Yikes, he was the son of a bull baiter.How have I not heard of bull baiting until now, ugly though it is.https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bull-baiting

I love the movie "Time Bandits", they did a great job casting the dwarves there.I'm still thrilled Sean Connery joined the cast and that George Harrison wrote part of the score (Dream away).RIP, Randall, Fidgit, Strutter, Wally and Vermin!Many happy returns, Og!
Guess what bulldogs were bred for 8(
